mapper.sql: id, folder_id, user_id, user_type, target_id, target_type, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO favorites (id, folder_id, user_id, user_type, target_id, target_type, created_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{folderId}, #{userId}, #{userType}, #{targetId}, #{targetType}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM favorites WHERE folder_id = #{folderId}
